hero.desc: Donate clothes, furniture, books, and more to local charities and individuals in need. Help us reduce waste and build a stronger community.

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.a1: You can donate clothes, furniture, books, electronics, kitchen items, baby goods, and more.
faq.a2: You can schedule a pickup after matching with an organization.
faq.q3: Is there a cost to use KindDrop?
faq.a4: All organizations go through a verification process.
